svg.text: NMOS common-gate + R_load from BVDD + 4-diode clamped bias
R divider from BVDD, clamped by 4x diode NMOS (W=18um)
PVDD overshoot (basic, 7V) = 168 mV spec <= 200 mV PASS
PVDD final (basic) = 4.978 V spec [4.9, 5.2] V PASS
PVDD monotonic = YES spec = yes PASS
Handoff glitch = 0 mV spec <= 100 mV PASS
50mA load: PVDD final = 4.977 V spec [4.9, 5.2] V PASS
Peak inrush = 22 mA spec <= 150 mA PASS
SS 150C: PVDD final = 4.942 V spec [4.9, 5.2] V PASS
Post-startup leakage < 1 uA spec <= 1 uA PASS
Fast ramp overshoot (10.5V) = 257 mV spec <= 200 mV FAIL (Cgd coupling)
FF -40C overshoot (10.5V) = 296 mV spec <= 200 mV FAIL (Cgd coupling)
8/12 specs PASS | Remaining: fast/slow ramp overshoot at BVDD=10.5V (Cgd coupling limited)
Block 09: Startup Circuit -- Analog AI Chips PVDD LDO Regulator
